description: A calm fox-like invoice and certificate guardian for a .NET builder, carrying a tiny seal charm and a tidy ledger-tab scarf.

pet_notes: Cute mascot-safe fox with a calm focused face, compact whole-body silhouette, warm amber and teal palette, tiny circular seal charm on chest, ledger-tab scarf instead of text, practical builder energy, designed for invoices, certificates, debugging, and careful review. No logos, no readable text, no UI.
style_notes: Clean collectible desk-toy feel, soft matte material, expressive eyes, readable at small size, consistent front-three-quarter character design across all states.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `3d-toy`: Stylized 3D toy mascot with smooth rounded forms, simple materials, clear silhouette, and no photoreal complexity. User style notes: Clean collectible desk-toy feel, soft matte material, expressive eyes, readable at small size, consistent front-three-quarter character design across all states..
